creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
I had noticed a while ago that when MDNS_AVAHI is set, xmms2 installs the wrong dependency.  The file it has listed as a dependency is actually in net/avahi-app.

Fix: The attached patch fixes this dependency problem.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Run `make config` and choose the MDNS_AVAHI option, then try to build the port.
